page_content:
LBSC708 Special Topics in Library and Information Science (1-3 Credits)

A special topics course with content determined by individual instructors.

For questions about the content of the course contact the College of Information Studies.

Restriction: Permission of INFO-College of Information Studies. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.

Additional Information: No student may earn more than a total of 12 credits (combined) in LBSC 708 and LBSC 709.
